message: External model unavailable (ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'torch' from agentlightning.verl eager import); completed deterministic preparation and generated an agent-side inference handoff.
blocker_reason: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'torch' — agentlightning.verl is eagerly imported when building the algorithm dispatch dict, even when algorithm=apo. No .env credentials configured; COPILOT_MODEL defaults to 'default' but model access unavailable in this environment.
